visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) In a brightly lit supermarket aisle with refrigerated shelves, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue bucket hat and a fuzzy blue dress over a white shirt, excitedly holds a large white and red package of Dachan chicken breast. She smiles widely, points at the product, and gestures with her hands while speaking to the camera. People in casual wear walk in the background near stacked boxes. (2) The camera focuses on the product packaging, showing the Dachan logo and images of sliced chicken. Yellow and red variety text overlays appear on the screen highlighting the price and name. The woman shows the back of the package, pointing at the nutrition label with a thumbs up in a close-up shot. (3) The scene transitions to a home dining setting. Two women sit behind a white table. One wears a red bucket hat and a yellow striped shirt; the other has long dark hair and a purple top. They have packages of the chicken breast on the table along with a wooden board holding sliced pieces. They look at the camera, talking animatedly and gesturing toward the food in a medium shot.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈 我不需要你了 因為我有雞胸. [Variety]: 拆開就能吃 大成舒肥法 原味嫩雞. (2) [Logo]: 大成 Dachan. [Variety]: 840克 299元. (3) [Subtitle]: 回去試試看值不值得. (4) [Subtitle]: 剪開就可以吃. (5) [Variety]: 舒肥雞胸肉. [Subtitle]: 每一袋是50元 大一包299. (6) [Variety]: 可以路過. [Subtitle]: 我們三個人一致認為都太甜. (7) [Subtitle]: 再見了. 可以買其他兩款喔.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 3 main female creators (one in blue hat, one in red hat, one in purple shirt) and at least 2 passers-by in the background of the Costco scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main Character 1: Long dark hair, blue bucket hat, blue fuzzy dress over a white shirt. Main Character 2: Red bucket hat, yellow and white horizontal striped shirt. Main Character 3: Long dark hair, dark purple long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is filmed inside a Costco warehouse club, featuring refrigerated grocery shelves stocked with chicken products and shoppers in the background. The second half is a domestic indoor setting with a white table, a beige sofa with plush toys, and household items in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy female vocal in a bright, friendly tone, speaking rapidly. An upbeat, major-key pop synth track with a steady electronic beat plays at a moderate volume. Subtle background noise from a large indoor commercial space is audible. (2) A sharp cut occurs as the speaker interacts with the product; a faint plastic rustling sound is heard as the package is handled. The BGM remains consistent. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting. Two female voices engage in a conversational, review-style dialogue. The acoustic texture changes to a cleaner room tone with slight wood-product bumping sounds from a cutting board. The music continues to drive the rhythm under the dialogue. (4) The voices conclude with a slightly humorous and dismissive inflection, followed by a quick audio fade out as the music ends.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Product Intro -> Demonstration -> Review -> Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: Reviewing a new 'Original' flavor chicken breast product from Dachan found at Costco, comparing it to existing flavors (Italian, Truffle), and ultimately advising viewers to skip it due to its excessive sweetness.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While a specific brand (Dachan) and retailer (Costco) are prominently featured, the creators provide a negative review ('Too sweet,' 'Can pass/skip it'), which is uncharacteristic of a typical paid endorsement.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media consumer review video using a two-part structure (store visit then home tasting) to provide a subjective verdict on a specific grocery item.
